title: Teaching & Sermons
shortDescription: Clear, reflective teaching for churches, small groups, schools, and community spaces.

title: Book Talks
shortDescription: Guided talks and Q&A around Saul's books, including belief, fatherhood, identity, and transformation.
idealAudience: Book clubs, churches, schools, libraries, discussion groups

title: Workshops
shortDescription: Interactive sessions for groups seeking thoughtful formation, creative clarity, and practical reflection.
idealAudience: Teams, ministries, youth groups, creative communities

title: Podcast Guest / Interview
shortDescription: Thoughtful conversation on faith, books, meaning, doubt, creativity, and transformation.

title: Photography Exhibitions
shortDescription: Exhibition talks, gallery conversations, creative sessions, and photography-centered events.
idealAudience: Galleries, community spaces, creative groups, schools

title: Custom Events
shortDescription: A flexible option for gatherings that need Saul's voice, presence, teaching, or creative perspective.
idealAudience: Churches, nonprofits, schools, community groups, creative teams
